name: cs308-ticketing-backend
description: CS 308 Online Ticketing Platform - Backend API

scripts.migrate: node -e "const pool = require('./src/config/database'); const fs = require('fs'); const sql = fs.readFileSync('./src/db/migrations/001_create_users_and_refresh_tokens.sql', 'utf8'); pool.query(sql).then(() => { console.log('✅ Migration completed'); process.exit(0); }).catch(err => { console.error('❌ Migration failed:', err); process.exit(1); });"

author: CS 308 Team
